description: baseline
shorten Smith-Ellsworth prompt: 16-dim verbose -> compact
shorten OCC emotion prompt: verbose steps -> compact
shorten L0: big_five compact OCEAN + attachment compact styles
shorten L2+L4: defense, bias, gross, kohlberg compact prompts
shorten L3+L5: gottman, sternberg, foucault, young, ace compact
shorten remaining: plutchik, ptsd, marion, strogatz, fisher, maslow, sdt
remove emotion_probe from L1 (overlaps with plutchik)
remove smith_ellsworth from L2 + maslow from L4 + compress anti_alignment_hint
full anti_alignment_hint compression: traits+attachment+defense+schema compact
conditional L5 trauma skills + remove marion/strogatz/foucault/fisher/sternberg/dirigent from L3

disable L3 entirely + DefenseMechanism removed. Pipeline: BigFive+Plutchik+OCC+ResponseGen only. composite_quality=0.38
MockProvider context-aware fix: response_generator now injects event-relevant emotion keywords. Quality metrics now meaningful.
re-enable TheoryOfMind: +30% tokens (+424), +4% quality (+0.03). ROI too poor.
re-enable DefenseMechanism: +18% tokens (+260), quality DECREASED (-0.06). MockProvider limitation.
REAL LLM (qwen3:14b) baseline: lean pipeline, 2 scenarios, 140s/event. Quality 0.75 validates MockProvider 0.71-0.75 range.
LEAN pipeline (6 skills) vs FULL (26 skills): lean wins - 65% fewer tokens (1516 vs 4295) with HIGHER quality (0.75 vs 0.74). Full pipeline adds noise without benefit for these scenarios.
FULL pipeline: 26 skills, quality 0.74 — WORSE than lean (0.75). Extra skills add noise.

DeepSeek V4 Flash LEAN: 6 skills, 4734 tokens, 38s. Quality 0.76. occ_plutchik_consistency=1.00 confirms OCC-Plutchik alignment. emotion_alignment=0 due to response_generator producing narration not dialogue.
DeepSeek V4 Flash FULL: 26 skills, 14169 tokens, 56s. Quality 0.62 — WORSE than lean (0.76). Confirms: extra skills add noise.
DeepSeek V4 Flash LEAN confirmed: 6 skills optimal.
DeepSeek V4 Pro thinking LEAN: quality 0.74, emotion_alignment first non-zero (0.50).
DeepSeek V4 Pro thinking FULL: quality 0.81. First time full > lean with thinking model! But 3x tokens for +0.07 quality.
DeepSeek V4 Pro MEDIUM (no Marion): QUALITY 0.87 BEST EVER. 10 skills, 7449 tokens, 62s, 3 scenarios.
+Marion: quality DROPPED 0.87→0.82, tokens +6.3%. Marion not useful for these scenarios. Keep disabled.
LLM-as-Judge launched. 6-dim DeepSeek Pro judge replaces keyword metrics.
COMPARISON: LEAN (6 skills). Quality 0.89, 4356 tokens, 32s. Most efficient.
COMPARISON: MEDIUM (10 skills). Quality 0.93 HIGHEST, 7595 tokens, 51s. OPTIMAL.
COMPARISON: FULL (26 skills). Quality 0.90, 14470 tokens, 56s. Higher tokens than Medium but LOWER quality. Extra skills are noise.

THEORY-OPTIMAL (13-17 skills): QUALITY 0.96 BEST EVER. Added over Medium: CognitiveBias(思维偏差≠防御), Marion(情爱现象≠行为模式), Foucault(权力动态), Kohlberg(道德推理), SDT(自决动机). Each addition answers a DIFFERENT psychological question. Scenario 1 scored PERFECT 1.00.
NO-BIO baseline (2 scenarios, DeepSeek V4 Pro). Quality 0.91.
WITH BIO (2 scenarios): QUALITY 0.98 BEST! +7.7% vs no-bio. defense_expression +1.5 (3.0→4.5). Token overhead +4.1%. Biological layer confirmed.
FULL+BIO (26 skills): quality 0.98! Bio layer rescues Full from 0.90→0.98. But +69% tokens vs optimal (13674 vs 8111). Confirms: bio helps noise tolerance but doesnt justify Full cost.
Zhihu 6-scenario benchmark: optimal 11-skills + bio + openness hint. AVG 0.90. Q15=1.00, Q24 improved 0.61->0.83.
Enriched 14 skills on Zhihu: AVG 0.87. Q1+Q17 improved but Q11+Q22 crashed. Extra skills help certain types, hurt others. Reverted.

Phenomenological Agent Runtime: 17 experimental modules integrated. 92 tests all pass. Cognitive Frame (orchestrator) triggered by prediction error, LoveState Fisher 3-stage, MemoryMetabolism 5-tier, ExperientialField Retention+Protention, SkillsMetabolism, NoiseManager, FeedbackLoop, soul.md I/O.
Prediction-error-driven Cognitive Frame: 60% token reduction vs per-event orchestrator. 10 events → 4 triggers. Low-significance routine events correctly skipped.
Memory metabolism verified: 5 core memories promoted correctly, 25 low-sig archived after simulated 25 days. Core→Long→Archive flow working. Memory Index with 5 pointers.
Skills metabolism: ptsd_trigger flagged (40d inactive), theory_of_mind+attachment marked merge (75% overlap). 3/8 skills flagged, noise ratio 38%.
Full Cognitive Frame integration verified: MockProvider instant tick, emotion=fear detected, response generated, memory ingested, 6 skills tracked. All subsystems working.
10-tick multi-subsystem stress test: all 15 Blackboard keys written, memory W1/S4, retention 9 items, skills 6 tracked, noise reports generated. Full pipeline verified.
Production API: CharacterMind v2 class, perceive()+tick()+get_response() API, 8 new production tests, 100 total all pass.

Full e2e CharacterMind: 3-round conversation OK, 6 workspace files generated (SOUL, AGENTS, MEMORY, TOOLS, config, growth_log), all subsystems active. MockProvider responses identical (known test limitation). Ready for real LLM.
